name: Western Copper & Gold Corp.
description: Western Copper and Gold Corporation is a Vancouver-based mining company focused on the development of the Casino Project, one of the world's largest and most economic copper-gold deposits located in Canada's Yukon Territory. The company is committed to responsible mining practices, environmental stewardship, and community engagement. With significant resources of copper, gold, molybdenum, and silver, Western Copper and Gold aims to supply critical minerals for a low-carbon future while delivering long-term value to shareholders through its advanced-stage development project, which is supported by strategic investments from industry leaders like Rio Tinto and Mitsubishi Materials.
